summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bruno Melito Hair salon app iteration 3 features - All 15 backend tests passed and all frontend UI tests passed
passed_tests: TEST 1: '/' shows public website (WebsitePage) with landing page
TEST 2: '/login' shows login page with email/password form
TEST 4: Login with admin@brunomelito.it / Admin123! redirects to /planning
TEST 5: 'Servizi' nav link opens services section on landing page
TEST 6: Service items on landing page show 'Prenota' text (22 items found)
TEST 7: Clicking service item opens booking flow with service pre-selected
TEST 8: Clicking promo card opens booking flow with promo applied (toast shown)
TEST 9: Booking flow 3 steps work (services -> date/time -> data entry)
TEST 10: /api/public/website returns config, reviews, gallery, services correctly
TEST 15: /api/whatsapp/generate-link requires auth and works with token
TEST 16: /api/reminders/auto-check requires auth and returns pending reminders
TEST 17: /reminders page shows WhatsApp messaging features (no SMS)
TEST 18: PlanningPage loads after login with reminder banner visible
seed_data_creation: None - using existing admin account and data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 testing completed. Key changes verified: 1) Routing works correctly (/ shows public site, /sito redirects to /, /login shows login page, login redirects to /planning). 2) Services section on landing page has clickable items with 'Prenota' text that open booking with pre-selected service. 3) Promo cards are clickable and open booking flow with promo applied (shows toast). 4) Twilio SMS endpoints (/api/sms/*) correctly return 404 (removed). 5) New WhatsApp link generator (/api/whatsapp/generate-link) works with auth. 6) Reminders page shows WhatsApp messaging features, no SMS references. 7) Video range request support added to /api/website/files/{id}.
